name: 40m_inverted_v_feedpoints_plus_y_7020khz
description: NEC +Y forward-direction feedpoint case at 7.020 MHz. Source #1 is the rear -Y element; source #2 is the forward +Y element and voltage phase reference.

fixed_feedlines.description: Example fixed lossless coax lengths for transforming NEC feedpoint impedances to phasing-box-end impedances. This is case metadata for the fixed-feedline example, not a generalized feedline sweep schema.

notes: This case starts from true NEC antenna feedpoint impedances, not phasing-box-end impedances.
The current voltage-ratio optimizer uses target.voltage_ratio_v2_over_v1 only.
The current-ratio target is preserved as metadata for future current-ratio optimization.
The fixed feedlines are transformed by examples/optimize_40m_feedpoints_fixed_feedlines.py before calling the existing Topology B optimizer.
Feedline loss, length sweep, and polarity handling are not implemented in this case.
